provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female combat pilot in her 30s with a lean build and burn scar tissue on her left hand, wearing an olive pressure-rated flight suit with squadron patches heat-bonded to both shoulders, a quick-release flight harness with emergency transponder clips, fingerless interface gloves with conductive pads, zero-g boots with ankle locks, flight goggles around her neck, the suit has been through enough Gs to show permanent stress lines at the shoulders and knees
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Combat pilot in olive flight suit with patches, headset, in cockpit area. Flight harness visible. Strong military pilot read.
